label: Opening Hours
summary: Instructions-only soft dossier for a structured opening-hours block: weekday → open/close pairs with sane handling of closed days, split shifts (lunch + dinner) and holiday exceptions. Renders semantically as a definition list so screen readers announce day/time pairs correctly, plus an inline microformat that emits schema.org OpeningHoursSpecification JSON-LD for SEO. No clock, no live 'open now' indicator (would require client-side time + timezone handling) — that is reserved for a future hard dossier (real-time-status).
